name: Euro Traditional Woven Stripe Decorative Throw Pillow Green - Threshold™
description:
Let your decor have a hint of warm, traditional style with the Euro Traditional Woven Stripe Decorative Throw Pillow from Threshold™. This square throw pillow features a woven stripe pattern in neutral hues for vintage flair. The soft cotton-linen shell with polyester fill makes it comfy to use, and it's recommended for indoor use. Place this woven throw pillow on your bed or couch to add classic appeal to your space.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
